text.tspan: EVENT SOURCING + CQRS: events are written; projections are read.
The natural marriage of two patterns.
(events published as they're appended; CDC or built-in)
REBUILD ANY PROJECTION at any time:
New projection? Replay events to populate. Bug in projection? Fix code, replay to repair.
The event log is the only thing that must be backed up.
SQL view: rows per month per account
QUERY: complex search over events for analysts
